Title: Admin-Managed Document Library for Hoops App
Description: Enable administrative users to upload, manage, and categorize PDF documents displayed in the Hoops app. Documents stored in Blob Storage; metadata stored in Table Storage including Section field.

Title: Define Table Storage Schema for Document Metadata
Description: Create a structured Azure Table Storage schema to store metadata for documents displayed in the Hoops app.
Acceptance Criteria: - Table named 'MenuDocuments' exists; - Columns include PartitionKey, RowKey, Title, BlobPath, BlobUrl, SortOrder, Description, IsActive, Season, LastUpdatedUtc, Section; - Schema documented for frontend and backend teams

Title: Create Azure Table Storage table 'MenuDocuments'
Description: Provision the table inside the existing Azure Storage Account.

Title: Document schema definition and naming conventions
Description: Document PartitionKey, RowKey, and all metadata fields including the new Section field.

Title: Create sample metadata rows for testing
Description: Insert sample rows into the table for UI and API validation.

Title: Implement Azure Function for PDF Upload and Metadata Write
Description: Create an Azure Function that allows admins to upload PDFs and automatically writes metadata to Table Storage.
Acceptance Criteria: - Admin can upload PDF; - File stored in Blob Storage; - Metadata row created including Section; - API returns success/failure; - Validation errors returned cleanly

Title: Create Azure Function endpoint for PDF upload
Implement Blob Storage upload logic
Description: Upload PDF to Blob Storage and generate BlobPath and BlobUrl.

Title: Write metadata row to Table Storage
Description: Insert metadata including Section, Title, Category, SortOrder, and BlobPath.

Title: Build Angular Admin UI for Document Upload and Management
Description: Create an admin UI page that allows uploading PDFs and entering metadata.
Acceptance Criteria: - Admin UI exists under /admin/documents; - Form includes Title, Category, Section, Season, SortOrder, File; - Calls upload API; - Shows success/error messages

Title: Create Angular route and upload form
Description: Add /admin/documents route and build upload form UI.

Title: Add dropdowns for Category and Section
Description: Populate dropdowns from static config or API.

Title: Integrate form with upload API
Description: Call Azure Function and handle responses.

Title: Update Public App to Load Documents Dynamically
Description: Modify the public-facing Hoops app to load documents dynamically from Table Storage metadata.
Acceptance Criteria: - API returns documents filtered by category and section; - Angular loads metadata dynamically; - Documents open via BlobUrl; - Inactive documents hidden

Title: Create public API to query documents
Description: Implement GET /documents?category=&section= using Table Storage queries.

Title: Update Angular menu to load metadata dynamically
Description: Replace static menu items with API-driven document lists.
